---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, behavior, or scope change
title: "[feature] "
labels: feature
---

## What

One or two sentences describing the feature.

## Why

The user problem it solves. Tie to a slice in `docs/roadmap.md` when possible.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Gherkin scenario(s) added or updated in `features/`
- [ ] Affected schemas updated in `shared-schemas/`
- [ ] Affected docs updated (`docs/architecture.md`, `docs/domain-model.md`, or a new ADR)
- [ ] Slice tag(s) applied to scenarios (`@slice-N`)

## Out of scope

What this issue is explicitly **not** doing.
